name: Full Consensus (Opening Gate)
hypothesis: The high-performing 'Full Consensus' signal, which combines BBO, deep-book, and shape imbalance, is known to be less reliable during the chaotic opening auction. By adding a time-based regime filter (`minute_of_session > 15`) to exclude the first 15 minutes, we can avoid the unstable microstructure and improve the signal's consistency and profitability.
mutation_note: Per feedback 'add_regime_filter' and loss bucket analysis showing losses clustered in the opening 15 mins. This spec gates the parent signal to only trade after the opening period (`minute_of_session > 15`).
